[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 000000000 a
2 000000100 1
3 000100010 2
4 100000010 2
5 111001101 6
6 011010111 6
7 101000000 2
